summary: Iteration 83 testing completed. Verified settlement adjustment formula implementation. The NEW formula (Adjustment = Actual Billable - Billed to Dist) is correctly implemented in both backend and frontend. Stock Out tab shows correct values. Create Settlement dialog shows new columns with correct calculations. Existing settlements created before the update don't have factory_distributor_adjustment field.
critical_code_review_comments: Existing settlements created before the formula update don't have factory_distributor_adjustment field - this is expected behavior as the field was added in the update

success_rate.backend: 100% - Settlement generation uses NEW formula correctly
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new columns and calculations verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Settlement adjustment formula has been updated. NEW formula: Adjustment = Actual Billable - Billed to Dist = qty × (1 - margin%) × (customer_price - base_price). Existing settlements may not have factory_distributor_adjustment field.

Create_Settlement_Dialog_Columns.frontend_calculation: Uses NEW formula correctly in SettlementsTab.jsx lines 130-178

Backend_Settlement_Generation.formula_implementation: Lines 4003-4011 in distributors.py use NEW formula

Settlement_Detail_View.note: Shows adjustment_payable for backward compatibility with existing settlements

Adjustment_Sign_Verification.positive_case: customer_price > base_price → positive adjustment (distributor owes factory)
Adjustment_Sign_Verification.negative_case: customer_price < base_price → negative adjustment (factory owes distributor)

formula_verification.NEW_FORMULA: Adjustment = Actual Billable - Billed to Dist = qty × (1 - margin%) × (customer_price - base_price)
